scripts.test: npm run test:foundation && npm run test:reactions
scripts.test:foundation: tsc scripts/architectureV2.foundation.test.ts --outDir .tmp-tests --module ES2022 --target ES2022 --moduleResolution bundler --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck && node .tmp-tests/scripts/architectureV2.foundation.test.js
scripts.test:reactions: tsc scripts/architectureV2.reactions.test.ts --outDir .tmp-tests --module ES2022 --target ES2022 --moduleResolution bundler --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck && node .tmp-tests/scripts/architectureV2.reactions.test.js
